## Test plan

## Checklist
- [ ] Linked issue or spec
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Docs updated (README / ARCHITECTURE / API / SECURITY)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env*` gitignored)
- [ ] CSP respected (no new `unsafe-*`)
- [ ] RBAC + audit reviewed (if touching server routes)
- [ ] i18n keys added for all 12 locales (if user-visible strings)
